pageTimings.text: It is sunny! The sun is bright. It feels warm.
It is rainy. Drops fall from the clouds. Drip, drip, drip.
It is windy. The wind blows hard. Leaves fly in the air.
It is snowy. White flakes fall. Everything looks white.
It is cloudy. Grey clouds fill the sky. Where is the sun?
Rumble! Flash! A storm is here. Then the rain falls.
After rain, look up! A rainbow! Red, orange, yellow, green, blue, purple.
Sun, rain, wind, snow. Weather changes every day. What is the weather today?
